meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills: Debug Faster & Ship SaaS Apps for Clients
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Master Claude Code skills to debug complex SaaS projects in record time. Professional-grade guide for freelance AI builders.
content.answer_block: To eliminate debugging bottlenecks, integrate Claude Code directly into your CLI for real-time context-aware analysis. By pairing it with Antigravity’s architectural mapping, you gain an intelligent layer that identifies root causes across your entire codebase, allowing you to bypass manual log tracing and push production-ready features significantly faster than competitors.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and your terminal is screaming a cryptic error message that shouldn't exist. You’re trapped in a cycle of 'guess-and-check' debugging, watching your billable hours evaporate while you manually trace execution paths through a bloated codebase. The friction between your intent and the compiler is the single biggest threat to your freelance profitability.

But what if you could outsource the cognitive load of debugging to an agent that understands your architecture better than you do? By configuring Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a senior-level engineer that never sleeps. This setup moves you beyond basic syntax fixing and into the realm of architectural optimization, ensuring you ship robust SaaS apps without the usual technical debt.

steps.title: Initialize Repository Context
steps.description: Establish the architectural boundaries so Claude Code understands your project structure before you start debugging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory and generate a high-level dependency graph and component interaction map.

steps.title: Ingest Error Logs with Intent
steps.description: Feed raw stack traces into the agent with specific constraints to prevent hallucinations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the latest error logs. Identify the specific function chain causing the memory leak.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file ./logs/error.log --task 'Identify root cause of stack overflow'

steps.title: Execute Targeted Refactoring
steps.description: Apply fixes incrementally to ensure local state remains consistent across the environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a refactor for the identified module to handle null exceptions gracefully without breaking existing API contracts.

steps.title: Automated Regression Verification
steps.description: Ensure your fix didn't introduce new issues by running a synthetic test suite against the changed code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test scenario for the patched module and verify it against the current codebase state.

steps.title: Sync Architectural Documentation
steps.description: Keep your project documentation updated automatically whenever a structural change occurs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Update the README and architectural docs to reflect the changes made to the service layer.

pro_tips: Use a .claudeignore file to exclude generated build artifacts; this significantly increases agent focus and lowers latency.
Always run 'claude status' before a major refactor to verify that the agent has indexed the most recent file changes.
For massive codebases, break your debug request into micro-tasks; Claude performs better with 5-line logic puzzles than 500-line architecture rewrites.
Leverage the --read-only flag when you want the agent to diagnose issues without suggesting code changes, perfect for initial security audits.
Create a 'context-snippet' file containing your project's coding standards to force the agent to output code that matches your style exactly.
content.next_steps: Once your debug loop is optimized, focus on setting up a CI/CD pipeline that triggers Claude Code for automated pull request reviews to catch issues before they reach production.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical edge to stop debugging and start building high-value SaaS products. Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
